summary: Delivery artifact linter fixture evidence showing that the tool can read bounty-required artifact names, validate submitted refs, and emit stable JSON before a worker submits a Frantic delivery.

observations.name: live_bounty_source
observations.value: Captured public API response for Frantic bounty #41 in bounty-41.json

observations.name: valid_case
observations.value: pass-artifacts.json provides all required keys and readable local evidence/report fixtures

observations.name: invalid_case
observations.value: fail-artifacts.json demonstrates missing keys, bad evidence_json, bad receipt_ref, dead local PR ref, and package mismatch
